title: anthemis cretica subsp. umbilicata
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. umbilicata is a subspecies of the Anthemis cretica plant, commonly known as a type of daisy or chamomile, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in soothing digestive issues and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Anthemis cretica subsp. umbilicata include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the flowers and leaves to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
